queries.question: List the countries for every immigration reporter.
queries.sql: SELECT Countries.countryName  from Immigration_Reporters_Countries join Countries on Immigration_Reporters_Countries.countryId = Countries.id join Immigration_Reporters on Immigration_Reporters_Countries.immigrationReporterId = Immigration_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Immigration_Reporters_Countries.countryId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Immigration_Reporters_Countries.immigrationReporterId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Immigration_Reporters)

queries.question: List the countries for every immigration reporter.
queries.sql: select immigration_reporters.reportername , countries.countryname from Immigration_Reporters_Countries join Countries on Immigration_Reporters_Countries.countryId = Countries.id join Immigration_Reporters on Immigration_Reporters_Countries.immigrationReporterId = Immigration_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?reportername ?countryname WHERE {
  ?immigration_reporters_countries a :Immigration_Reporters_Countries .
  ?countries a :Countries .
  ?immigration_reporters_countries p:hasCountries ?countries .
  ?immigration_reporters a :Immigration_Reporters .
  ?immigration_reporters_countries p:hasImmigration_Reporters ?immigration_reporters .
  ?immigration_reporters p:reporterName ?reportername .
  ?countries p:countryName ?countryname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the countries for every immigration reporter.
